blended.narrative: Lake Louise is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,946 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
